title: Who is Sleeping
description: The project detects when a Minecraft server transitions from night to day and broadcasts a message about the player who caused the transition by sleeping.
body: **"Who Is Sleeping" is a Minecraft mod that notifies players when the day transitions from night because another player has slept. When the night ends, the mod broadcasts a message indicating which player has caused the transition by sleeping, enhancing the multiplayer experience by keeping players informed about game events.**
